name: Unit Converters
description: Instant client-side converters for length, weight, volume, temperature, and other measurement units.

tools.name: Length Converter
tools.description: Convert between meters, feet, miles, kilometers, inches, and more.

tools.name: Weight Converter
tools.description: Convert mass units like kilograms, pounds, ounces, and grams.

tools.name: Temperature Converter
tools.description: Convert between Celsius, Fahrenheit, and Kelvin.

tools.name: Volume Converter
tools.description: Convert liters, gallons, cups, milliliters, and other volume units.

tools.name: Area Converter
tools.description: Convert square meters, acres, hectares, square feet, and more.

tools.name: Speed Converter
tools.description: Convert mph, km/h, m/s, knots, and other speed units.

tools.name: Time Converter
tools.description: Convert seconds, minutes, hours, days, weeks, and years.

tools.name: Pressure Converter
tools.description: Convert pascals, bar, psi, atm, and mmHg.

tools.name: Energy Converter
tools.description: Convert joules, calories, kilowatt-hours, and BTU.

tools.name: Power Converter
tools.description: Convert watts, kilowatts, horsepower, and BTU/hour.

tools.name: Force Converter
tools.description: Convert newtons, pounds-force, kilogram-force, and dynes.

tools.name: Angle Converter
tools.description: Convert degrees, radians, gradians, and arcminutes.

tools.name: Data Storage Converter
tools.description: Convert bytes, kilobytes, megabytes, gigabytes, and terabytes.

tools.name: Data Transfer Rate Converter
tools.description: Convert bps, Kbps, Mbps, Gbps, and MB/s.

tools.name: Fuel Consumption Converter
tools.description: Convert MPG, km/L, and L/100km fuel economy units.

tools.name: Density Converter
tools.description: Convert kg/m3, g/cm3, lb/ft3, and other density units.

tools.name: Frequency Converter
tools.description: Convert hertz, kilohertz, megahertz, and gigahertz.

tools.name: Cooking Measurement Converter
tools.description: Convert cups, tablespoons, teaspoons, grams, and ounces for recipes.

tools.name: Shoe Size Converter
tools.description: Convert shoe sizes between US, UK, EU, and centimeters.

tools.name: Ring Size Converter
tools.description: Convert ring sizes across US, UK, EU, and diameter charts.

tools.name: Roman Numeral Converter
tools.description: Convert numbers to Roman numerals and back.

tools.name: Number to Words Converter
tools.description: Spell out numbers in words for checks and documents.

tools.name: Binary to Decimal Converter
tools.description: Convert numbers between binary, decimal, hex, and octal.

tools.name: Bra Size Converter
tools.description: Convert bra sizes between US, UK, EU, and FR systems.

tools.name: Clothing Size Converter
tools.description: Convert clothing sizes across US, UK, EU, and international charts.

tools.name: Inches to CM Converter
tools.description: Dedicated converter between inches and centimeters.

tools.name: KG to Lbs Converter
tools.description: Dedicated converter between kilograms and pounds.

tools.name: Liters to Gallons Converter
tools.description: Dedicated converter between liters and US/UK gallons.

tools.name: Time Zone Converter
tools.description: Convert a time between different world time zones.

tools.name: Currency Converter
tools.description: Convert between USD, EUR, PKR, INR, AED and more with live mid-market rates.
